description: Letter from the judge Menashshe to the Cairene judge Avraham b. Natan regarding a personal and communal affair in the small town of Sumbutya (Sunbāṭ), Lower Egypt, signed by the judge, the rosh ha-qahal ('head of the congregation') and five others, ca. 1100. The person in the middle of controversy, Sasson b. Yefet, is mentioned in several other documents from Sunbāṭ, see PGPID 1003.
description_he: מכתב מהשופט מנשה לשופט הקהירי אברהם בן נתן על עניין קהילתי וסכסוך אישי בסנבוטא (סנבוט), בערך 1100.
